spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates that both spellings resolve to the same logic during the migration window. Toggle between old / new spelling, identical render.

interactive.rationale: Two <select>s — direction value and old/new property — drive a live single-popover stage plus two parallel code panels.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a synonym-window demonstration; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't explicitly call out the deprecation warning Chrome emits when inset-area is used. Doesn't show the moment after the deprecation period when inset-area is removed (e.g. a mocked 'future Chrome' state).

design_system.rationale: CSS variables; --accent-blue popover passes AA on --bg-ivory text.

openQuestions.title: Surface the deprecation warning
openQuestions.detail: When the visitor picks 'inset-area (deprecated)' the page should explicitly call out that Chrome emits a console deprecation warning. Capture console output or mock the warning text inline.

openQuestions.title: Add a 'future Chrome' simulation
openQuestions.detail: Show what happens when inset-area is fully removed: the popover stays at its default position (anchor() / fixed). Gives the visitor urgency about the migration deadline.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 2 follow-up question(s) remain.
